overall.description: First-person driving perspective from inside an Audi vehicle during a heavy rainstorm at night. The driver navigates a multi-lane highway, passes through a well-lit concrete tunnel, and overtakes several other vehicles while windshield wipers maintain visibility. High-quality game engine footage with realistic rain and lighting effects.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy rain on the highway, approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: red taillights visible ahead, maintaining distance on the wet highway

entered.detail: metal guardrails running parallel to the left side of the highway
large concrete tunnel entrance with overhead lighting visible inside
highway directional sign mounted above the road

segments.scene_description: Driving on a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night, approaching a tunnel entrance. The windshield wipers move rapidly to clear heavy rain. Metal guardrails line both sides of the road, and the dark tunnel mouth looms ahead with interior lights visible.

events.description: overtaking a slower vehicle on the left side within the tunnel
approaching tunnel exit with rain and darkness visible at the tunnel mouth

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tunnel, overtaking slower traffic on the left while maintaining speed

notable_agents.action: silver sedan being overtaken on the left side in the tunnel

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete walls of the tunnel interior with horizontal seams
rows of bright rectangular lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
blue directional sign indicating tunnel exit directions

segments.scene_description: Inside a well-lit concrete tunnel with smooth grey walls and rows of overhead lights. The vehicle overtakes a silver sedan on the left. The tunnel exit becomes visible in the distance, showing the rainy night outside. The environment is sheltered from the rain but the windshield remains wet.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit from tunnel into open rain

events.description: exiting tunnel back into heavy rain environment with immediate visibility reduction
overtaking a yellow vehicle on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of the tunnel exit and adjusting to the heavy rain conditions while overtaking

notable_agents.action: yellow compact car being passed on the left side

entered.detail: dark night sky visible again after exiting the tunnel
concrete bridge structure crossing over the highway ahead
tall sodium vapor lamps illuminating the highway from the left

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel back into the heavy rainstorm, with windshield wipers working immediately to clear the downpour. The vehicle overtakes a yellow car on the left. Highway overpasses and street lights become visible against the dark sky as the car continues on the wet multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with moderate traffic in heavy rain

events.description: passing under highway overpass temporarily blocking the sky view
overtaking white sedan on the right side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the highway, executing overtaking maneuvers around slower traffic in heavy rain conditions

notable_agents.action: white sedan being overtaken on the right side, moving slower in the rain

entered.detail: large illuminated bridge or overpass structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the rain-slicked highway at high speed, passing under concrete overpasses. The vehicle overtakes a white sedan on the right. Guardrails run close to the left side of the vehicle while distant structures and road signs appear through the rain. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm against the heavy downpour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a rain-lashed highway into a sheltered tunnel before returning to a heavy nocturnal downpour. It begins on a rain-soaked multi-lane highway where windshield wipers work rapidly against a storm as the vehicle approaches a dark tunnel mouth. As the car enters the tunnel, the environment shifts to a well-lit concrete corridor with smooth grey walls, allowing the vehicle to overtake a silver sedan before the rainy night reappears at the distant exit. The scene then opens back into the storm, with the wipers immediately resuming their rhythm as the car passes a yellow vehicle and drives under concrete overpasses. Finally, the camera continues at high speed along the slick road, overtaking a white sedan while guardrails and distant road signs blur through the persistent heavy rain.
